name: agent-council
description: Runtime-portable 5-agent quality gate for tier-1 artifacts — installable as a Claude Code plugin

plugins.name: agent-council
plugins.description: Quality-gate any text artifact through 5 role-conditioned LLM deliberators (Skeptic, Voice & Identity, Evidence & Calibration, Strategy & Stakes, Adjudicator). 2-round async + cross-read. Returns SHIP/REVISE/HOLD + revision brief. Slash commands wrap the Python CLI.
